notes: v0.16.82 — Practice trainer for rift modes + mini-boss. Practice mode left rail now lists 4 new trainer tiles next to ARENA / CAPTURE / PAINT: CORE DEFENCE (HAZARD), CHAIN LINKS (SLIPSTREAM), OVERLOAD GRID (STRAFE) and MINI-BOSS (random of PRISM CORE / MITOSIS / RAIL SENTINEL / HIVE MOTHER). All four give zero XP / PULSE / keys / leaderboard writes — pure freeplay. Each tile draws its own animated preview (pulsing core + seekers, hex pad ring, generator + heat bars, rotating prism core + circling ship). Boss-key gate bypassed for practice mini-boss. Doubles as a clean repro path for the empty-arena report: try MINI-BOSS in practice — if it spawns fine the bug is rift-state plumbing; if blank the bug is in MiniBoss itself. Either way next ship gets a precise target. Windows only.
